playbook.intent: New task to self-contained contractor brief with context, definition of done, deliverable format, escalation path.
playbook.scope: Founder produces a self-contained brief for each new task handed to a contractor. Output: brief with context, definition of done, deliverable format, escalation path. Exit artifact: brief pinned in shared workspace + accepted by contractor in writing.

success-criteria.criterion: Brief includes context, AC, deliverable format, escalation

stage.name: Frame context
stage.intent: Why now, where it fits, what the client cares about.
stage.decision-gate: Advance once context fits 3 lines without losing meaning.

stage.name: Definition of done
stage.decision-gate: Advance only if AC are testable by someone else.

stage.name: RACI + escalation
stage.intent: Owner + decision rights + when to escalate.
stage.decision-gate: Advance with named owner + escalation written.

stage.name: Hand over + log
stage.intent: Contractor accepts in writing; brief logged.

tasks.task: Ask contractor to confirm in writing

stage.decision-gate: Required: written acceptance before work begins.

extra.value: [Full project plan - task-level brief only, 'Long-form spec - concise, structured brief']
[Contractor signed + onboarded, Brief template pinned in shared workspace]
[Briefing via Slack DM with no AC - rework guaranteed, Skipping escalation rules - contractor sits on blockers, Letting briefs balloon past one screen - nobody reads it]
['Could a different contractor execute this brief without me?', 'Are AC testable by someone else?', 'Did I get a written acceptance?']

{human: faion get-content subcontractor-task-brief-generation --format md, agent: faion get-content subcontractor-task-brief-generation --format context, json: faion get-content subcontractor-task-brief-generation --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P5 micro-agency founder persona}]
